Coordinator.//EnrollmentSecret: Set via env (Coordinator__EnrollmentSecret) or user-secrets. Must match the coordinator's Auth:NodeEnrollmentSecret.

Node.Name: local-node
Node.//MaxConcurrency: Advisory cap reported to the coordinator. null = unbounded.
Node.//Labels: Free-form key/value pairs surfaced on the coordinator's node snapshot.

Models.//Include: Empty = advertise everything the backend reports.
Models.//Exclude: Names matched here are dropped from the report.

//Backend: Type — 'ollama' (default) or 'openai'. 'openai' drives any server speaking the OpenAI wire format: vLLM, llama.cpp's server, LM Studio, TGI, or a hosted provider. It reads the OpenAi section below.
//Ollama: RequestTimeout — how long to wait on a single Ollama call. Defaults to 5 minutes to match the coordinator's Dispatcher:TimeoutSeconds; HttpClient's own default is only 100s, which a cold large model blows through. Raise it for very large models.
//OpenAi: Used only when Backend:Type=openai, and then BaseUrl is REQUIRED — the node refuses to start without it. ApiKey must come from env (OpenAi__ApiKey) or user-secrets, never from this file. Models:Include is effectively mandatory against a hosted provider: its catalogue is hundreds of models this node cannot serve, and reporting them all makes the coordinator route anything here.
